TABLE.NAME: tool_timelocker
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores the gradebook lock scheduling configuration per course

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the course this configuration applies to

FIELD.NAME: modtype
FIELD.COMMENT: The module or activity type last scheduled

FIELD.NAME: schedulestart
FIELD.COMMENT: Timestamp when the first session starts

FIELD.NAME: activitiespersession
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of activities to lock together per session

FIELD.NAME: shownote
FIELD.COMMENT: Default value for showing the student-facing lock note on new selections

FIELD.NAME: resetunselected
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether unselected activities of this modtype have their lock time cleared

TABLE.NAME: tool_timelocker_items
TABLE.COMMENT: Course modules selected for gradebook lock scheduling

FIELD.NAME: cmid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the selected course module

FIELD.NAME: shownote
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show the student-facing lock note on this activity

INDEX.NAME: cmid
INDEX.COMMENT: Fast lookup of scheduling info by course module
